Using `select()` without specifying columns fetches all columns from the FOOD table, which wastes bandwidth and memory if only a subset of columns is needed. Specify only the required columns explicitly, e.g., `context.select(FOOD.NDBNO, FOOD.DESCRIPTION).from(FOOD).fetch()`.
